title: Student Health Portal Update
transcript: Good afternoon. The Student Health Center would like to inform you that the online appointment system has been upgraded. Starting today, students can now schedule same-day appointments through the health portal using their university login. Prescription refill requests can also be submitted online and will be processed within two business days. The portal now includes a symptom checker tool to help determine whether an in-person visit is necessary. For technical issues with the portal, please contact the IT help desk. The health center phone line remains available for urgent matters.

questions.stem: What new feature has been added to the health portal?
questions.explanation: Students can now schedule same-day appointments through the health portal.

questions.stem: How long will prescription refill requests take to process?
questions.explanation: Prescription refill requests will be processed within two business days.

questions.stem: What should students do if they have technical issues with the portal?
options: Visit the health center in person
questions.explanation: For technical issues with the portal, students should contact the IT help desk.
